title: Gift Card Acceptance
description: Which merchants and online stores accept multi‑brand gift cards such as UpCadhoc, Illinocado, and CADO in France?
narrative: The user is looking for a comprehensive, up‑to‑date list or map of physical locations and e‑commerce sites that accept these multi‑brand gift vouchers. Relevant results should describe the partner network, cover major categories (fashion, beauty, food, leisure, etc.), indicate whether acceptance is online, offline, or both, and provide location‑based filtering (e.g., by city or postal code). Documents that mention acceptance maps, partner sign lists, or searchable directories of participating retailers are considered relevant.

title: Mild Lamb Tagine
description: Looking for a traditional Moroccan lamb tagine recipe that uses olives, preserved lemon, saffron, and moderate spices, with clear preparation steps and a reasonable portion size.
narrative: The user wants an authentic Moroccan lamb tagine suitable for a small household, emphasizing key ingredients such as lamb, green olives, preserved or candied lemon, saffron, and a balanced spice blend (cumin, cinnamon, ras el hanout) without overwhelming heat. Relevant documents must provide a complete ingredient list, quantities, step‑by‑step cooking instructions, and total cooking time. Recipes that omit any of the essential ingredients, use excessive amounts of vegetables or spices, or lack detailed instructions are not relevant.

title: Lotus Elise Pricing
description: What are the current price ranges for new and used Lotus Elise models in Europe, taking into account year, mileage, fuel type, and CO₂ emissions?
narrative: The user is looking for information that combines manufacturer price specifications for a new Lotus Elise (e.g., €51,030‑€76,640, 173‑175 g/km CO₂, 7.5 L/100 km) with real‑world used‑car listings (prices, mileage, model years, fuel type, and condition). Relevant documents should include official new‑car price tables, emissions and consumption figures, as well as used‑car advertisements that show price, mileage, year, fuel type, and any additional relevant details such as manual versus automatic transmission.

title: Veal Paupiettes Variations
description: What are the different recipes, ingredient substitutions, and cooking methods for preparing veal paupiettes?
narrative: The user is looking for detailed guidance on making veal paupiettes, including classic and creative recipes, suggested stuffing (e.g., mushrooms, pesto, mozzarella, sausage), sauce options (cream, tomato, white wine, balsamic), cooking techniques (pan‑searing, oven‑baking, simmering), cooking times, and serving ideas. Relevant documents should provide specific ingredient lists, step‑by‑step instructions, tips for preparation, and variations that modify the traditional dish. Documents that only mention veal paupiettes in passing or lack concrete recipe information are not relevant.

title: Car Sun Protection
description: What solutions (sun visors, tinted films, other accessories) are available to protect a vehicle’s interior and occupants from UV rays and heat while remaining legal and practical?
narrative: The user is looking for comprehensive information on ways to shield a car from sunlight, including the different types of car sun visors (roll‑up, rear‑window, electrostatic), self‑applied solar‑tint films (pre‑cut and cut‑out kits), their installation methods, dimensions, UV‑blocking performance, heat‑insulation benefits, privacy advantages, and any safety or legal constraints (e.g., minimum visible light transmission for front windows). Relevant documents should describe product features, installation steps, legal requirements, and comparative benefits such as UV blockage percentages, heat reduction, fuel‑economy impact, and suitability for protecting children in the rear seat.

title: Petit Bateau Women's T‑Shirts
description: What styles, materials, and color options are currently available in the Petit Bateau women’s T‑shirt collection?
narrative: The user is looking for detailed information about the range of women's T‑shirts offered by Petit Bateau, including distinctions such as long‑sleeve vs. short‑sleeve, plain versus printed designs, and the use of organic cotton or other fabrics. Relevant documents should describe specific product lines, seasonal releases, and any notable features (e.g., iconic cuts, brand codes) that help the user evaluate which T‑shirts fit their style and material preferences.

title: Renault Employee Discounts
description: What purchase, lease‑with‑option, and financing offers, discounts, and conditions are available for acquiring a new Renault through the company's employee‑price program?
narrative: The user wants detailed information on the Renault employee‑price vehicle scheme, including the range of discount percentages, lease‑with‑option (LOA) terms such as duration, mileage limits, monthly payments, insurance costs, and any guarantees or refund policies. Relevant documents are those that describe discount levels, financing structures, insurance add‑ons, and customer‑service guarantees associated with buying a new Renault at employee‑price rates.

title: War School e‑book purchase
description: What are the steps, supported file formats, and payment options for buying an e‑book from the School of War website?
narrative: The user wants a complete guide to acquiring a War School e‑book, including the available formats (epub2, mobi, azw3), how to obtain the download links after purchase, accepted payment methods (credit card via Société Générale, bank transfer), and any security or privacy considerations (cookies, secure SSL connection). Documents that describe the e‑book download process, payment handling, and related technical details are relevant.

title: Option vs Reload
description: When is it more advantageous for a French jobseeker to exercise the right of option instead of waiting for the reloading of unemployment benefits?
narrative: The user seeks practical guidance on deciding between the right of option and the standard reloading of ARE rights. Relevant documents should explain the eligibility conditions (e.g., 130 days/910 hours of work, allowance ≤ €20/day or ≥ 30 % increase), the financial impact of each choice (comparing remaining allowance versus higher new allowance), the procedural steps (application deadline of 21 days, irrevocable decision), and any deadlines or special cases (apprenticeship contracts, pre‑Nov 2019 rules). Documents that provide examples, calculators, or clear comparisons of the two pathways are considered relevant.

title: AXA client portal access
description: How do I log into the correct AXA online client space for my salary‑saving and insurance contracts, and what steps should I follow if I have forgotten my password?
narrative: The user is looking for detailed, step‑by‑step instructions on accessing the appropriate AXA client area (e.g., https://client.axa.fr for insurance services and the dedicated AXA Banque portal for banking services) to manage salary‑saving plans, insurance contracts, and related documents. The answer should cover the authentication URL, how to determine which portal to use, how to recover or reset a forgotten password, and basic security checks (HTTPS, correct domain). Documents that mention the client‑area URLs, password‑recovery process, and the distinction between insurance and banking client spaces are relevant.

title: French EV Incentives
description: What purchase subsidies and tax exemptions are available for new electric vehicles in France in 2021, and how do they impact the effective purchase price?
narrative: The user seeks detailed information on French government and regional incentives for buying an electric car, including the green bonus, conversion premium, retrofit premium, used‑EV bonus, and registration‑tax exemption. Relevant documents must describe eligibility criteria such as CO₂ limits, price caps, income thresholds, scrappage requirements, and the amounts or percentages of each aid, as well as how these benefits reduce the net cost of the vehicle.

title: Bicarbonate Treatment Guidelines
description: What are the proper concentration, preparation steps, and application timing for a sodium bicarbonate spray to prevent downy mildew on tomato and potato plants?
narrative: The user seeks a practical, detailed protocol for using baking soda (sodium bicarbonate) as a preventative spray against downy mildew on tomatoes and potatoes. Relevant information must include the exact ratio of bicarbonate to water, any recommended additives to improve leaf adhesion, mixing instructions, suggested frequency of application, safety considerations for the plants and eventual consumption, and evidence of effectiveness. Documents that describe a 1‑tablet (or tablespoon) per litre (or per 5 L) recipe, mixing tips, spray techniques, and the advantages of bicarbonate (non‑toxic, edible, etc.) satisfy the need.

title: Pole Shift Prophecies
description: What are the main modern prophecies that predict a pole shift and a three‑day period of darkness, and which sources and dates do they reference?
narrative: The user seeks documents that describe alleged prophecies of a planetary pole shift accompanied by three days of darkness, including the originators of the predictions (e.g., Padre Pio, Nostradamus, Hopi, Nibiru enthusiasts), the specific dates or timeframes mentioned, and the reasoning or signs cited. Relevant passages must mention these elements and provide the prophecy’s context or source.

title: Watch Spaceballs French
description: Where can I legally stream the French‑language version of the 1987 comedy film "La Folle Histoire de l'Espace"?
narrative: The user is looking for official, authorized services that provide a high‑quality (e.g., HD) streaming or rental of the French‑dubbed version of Mel Brooks' 1987 film, known in French as "La Folle Histoire de l'Espace" (also "Spaceballs"). Relevant documents should mention legitimate platforms (e.g., subscription services, digital purchase/rental sites) and may include a brief synopsis or review of the film to confirm it is the correct title. Mentions of free, pirated, torrent, or unverified streaming links are not relevant, nor are unrelated privacy policy texts. The answer should satisfy the user's need for a lawful viewing option and confirm the film’s identity.

title: Artus Season 3 role
description: What character does comedian Artus portray in Season 3 of Le Bureau des légendes, and how did he prepare for and experience this espionage role?
narrative: The user is looking for detailed information about Artus’s involvement in the French series Le Bureau des légendes (The Office of Legends) during its third season. Relevant documents should mention the character name (Jonas Maury), his role within the DGSE, Artus’s casting process, his preparation (learning lines, foreign‑language passages, self‑mockery, and contrast with his comedy background), and any comments he made about the experience. Documents that only discuss other seasons, unrelated cast members, or general series summaries without reference to Artus are not relevant.

title: Prevail Conjugation
description: What are the full conjugations, meanings, and usage examples of the verb “prevail” in English and French?
narrative: The user is looking for a comprehensive overview of the verb “prevail,” including all grammatical forms (present, past, future, conditional, subjunctive, infinitive, past participle) in both English and French, coupled with definitions, synonyms, and example sentences that illustrate its intransitive and transitive uses.

title: Episode Chronology
description: What are the broadcast years, celebrity guests, and remote locations featured in each episode of the French TV series Rendez‑vous en terre inconnu?
narrative: The user wants a complete, ordered list of every Rendez‑vous en terre inconnu episode, specifying for each episode the year it aired, the celebrity who accompanied the host, and the specific remote culture or region visited. Relevant information must include an episode number (or sequence), the broadcast year, the guest name, and the destination (e.g., Madagascar, Mongolia, Ethiopia, etc.).

title: Truffle Purée Suitability
description: Is the frozen Black Truffle Potato Crush appropriate for someone recovering from diarrhea?
narrative: The user wants to determine whether the Black Truffle Potato Crush product fits the dietary recommendations for the post‑diarrhea recovery phase. Relevant information includes the product’s ingredient list, nutritional values, fiber and fat content, presence of dairy or high‑fiber vegetables, and any additives that might irritate the gut, as well as the health article that outlines suitable foods (e.g., low‑fiber, low‑fat, cooked vegetables, rice, plain potatoes) and foods to avoid (raw vegetables, high‑fiber legumes, dairy, spicy or fatty items). Documents that mention the product details and the diarrhea‑friendly diet guidelines are considered relevant.

title: Paris Venue Rental
description: Find detailed information on renting Espace Charenton in Paris, including its size, capacity, event history, and contact details.
narrative: The user is looking for a venue in Paris to host events and is specifically interested in the rental options for Espace Charenton. Relevant material should describe the venue’s total area (about 3000 m²), the number of events it can accommodate (around 300 events), its annual visitor count (approximately 200,000), location (Paris 12), available spaces such as the Grand Salons, and provide contact information for booking. Any document that includes these specifications or comparable venue details meets the relevance criteria.

title: Green Supplier Comparison
description: What are the differences between French electricity suppliers that offer 100 % renewable power in terms of price, contract flexibility, and value‑added services?
narrative: The user wants to compare providers that claim fully green electricity (e.g., Urban Solar Energy, Alpiq, E.Leclerc Energies, ekWateur). Relevant information includes each supplier’s pricing model (fixed tariff, market‑linked price, off‑peak options), contract terms (binding vs non‑binding, ability to revert to regulated rates), transparency features (absence of hidden fees, Guarantees of Origin), and additional services such as battery storage, mobile‑app consumption monitoring, self‑consumption options, or customer support. Documents that describe these aspects for the listed green suppliers are considered relevant; generic mentions of electricity without a focus on renewable content or the above criteria are not.

title: Kia EV6 vs Niro
description: What are the price, electric range, and incentive differences between the Kia EV6 and the Kia Niro (plug‑in hybrid and fully electric) models sold in France in 2022?
narrative: The user is researching Kia’s electric and plug‑in hybrid offerings to decide which model best fits their needs. Relevant documents must provide the MSRP (including any French ecological bonus or tax credits), official WLTP electric range, battery capacity, and key specifications for the 2022 Kia EV6 and the 2022 Kia Niro (both PHEV and EV versions). Information about available government incentives, charging capabilities, and any recent pricing updates or recalls that could affect the purchase decision should also be considered. Documents that only mention unrelated Kia models, generic dealership information, or non‑French pricing are not relevant.

title: Gallic Ancestry Myth
description: What is the historical origin and evolution of the claim that the French are descendants of the ancient Gauls?
narrative: The user seeks a comprehensive overview of how the notion that "our ancestors are the Gauls" was created, propagated, and later challenged. Relevant material must explain the earliest use of the term by Julius Caesar, its adoption in 19th‑century school textbooks during the Second Empire and Third Republic, the role of nationalist education, and modern scholarly critiques that emphasize the multi‑ethnic origins of the French population. Documents that trace the linguistic, archaeological, and historiographic arguments for and against a singular Gallic ancestry are considered relevant.

title: Faro Budget Car
description: What are the cheapest car rental options at Faro Airport that include free cancellation and basic insurance for a driver aged 26‑65?
narrative: The user is looking for low‑price car‑rental offers in Faro (ideally at the airport) that provide free cancellation (up to 24 hours before pick‑up), include or clearly price basic insurance, have air‑conditioning, and are available to drivers between 26 and 65 years old. Relevant results should list daily rates, cancellation terms, insurance options, driver‑age eligibility, and agency quality ratings.

title: Nantes Station Rentals
description: What car and utility rental services, prices, opening hours, vehicle availability, and reservation policies are offered by agencies at Nantes South Train Station?
narrative: The user is planning to pick up a rental vehicle directly at Nantes South (Gare Sud) and needs comprehensive details about the local agencies (e.g., Europcar, ADA, SIXT). Documents that contain these specifics are considered relevant.

title: Resistant Potato Varieties
description: Which potato cultivars are known to be resistant to downy mildew and other common fungal diseases?
narrative: The user is looking for a list of potato varieties that show resistance to downy mildew (late blight) and other prevalent fungal pathogens such as scab, alternaria, and rhizoctonia. Relevant information should include the names of the cultivars, the specific diseases they resist, and any supporting details (e.g., breeding background, field performance). Documents that merely discuss general cultivation practices without naming resistant varieties are not relevant, whereas sources that name varieties like Samba, Charlotte, Rose de France, or others and explicitly state their disease‑resistance traits satisfy the information need.

title: Beaujolais Cru Comparison
description: What are the distinguishing characteristics, quality levels, and recommended food pairings for each of the ten Beaujolais crus?
narrative: The user seeks a detailed side‑by‑side overview of the ten Beaujolais crus (Morgon, Régnié, Moulin‑à‑Vent, Côte de Brouilly, Brouilly, Juliénas, Saint‑Amour, Chénas, Chiroubles, Fleurie), including their flavor profiles, typical terroir, relative quality and aging potential, and suggested dishes to pair with each wine. Relevant content must describe each cru’s unique attributes and provide practical pairing guidance.

title: Men's Durable Boat Shoes
description: What are the best men's boat shoes that combine high durability, non‑slip soles, and water‑resistant leather for sailing and everyday use?
narrative: The user seeks recommendations for men's boat shoes that are specifically engineered for sailing and other wet‑environment activities. title: Space vs Scenic
description: What are the differences in dimensions, engine specifications, and price between the Renault Space and the Renault Grand Scenic?
narrative: The user wants a side‑by‑side comparison of the Renault Space and the Renault Grand Scenic, focusing on vehicle length, width, height, available powertrains (e.g., Blue dCi 160/190 EDC, TCe 140), energy class, and listed purchase or lease prices. title: Corfu Car Rental
description: What car‑rental options are available in Corfu, including agencies, daily prices by vehicle class, and policies such as free cancellation and unlimited mileage?
narrative: The user seeks detailed information to choose a rental car in Corfu. title: Reunion Car Hire
description: What car rental companies operate on Réunion Island, where can I pick up a vehicle, and what are their rates and included services such as insurance, mileage limits, and child‑seat provisions?
narrative: The user is planning a trip to Réunion and wants a comprehensive overview of local car‑rental providers (e.g., My Car Loc, Budget, ADA, local agencies). title: US Car Logos
description: What is the history, symbolism, and design evolution of major American automobile brand logos?
narrative: The user is looking for a comprehensive overview of the logos used by prominent United States automobile manufacturers. Relevant documents should describe each brand’s original logo design, the meaning behind its visual elements (shapes, colors, symbols), and any notable redesigns or variations over time. The answer should cover at least the major marques mentioned in the source material (e.g., Chevrolet, Cadillac, Chrysler, Dodge, Ford, Jeep, Lincoln, Buick, GMC, Corvette, Tesla, and historic or discontinued brands such as Oldsmobile, Pontiac, and Plymouth). Information about the designers, the era of introduction, and the cultural or marketing rationale for the logo changes should be included to satisfy the user’s intent.

title: Film Injury Compensation
description: What real-world road‑accident compensation laws and amounts apply to injuries like those suffered by characters in the movie *Mad Max*?
narrative: The user is looking for information that links the fictional injuries depicted in *Mad Max* (e.g., burns, loss of a child, permanent disability) with actual legal compensation frameworks for road‑traffic victims. Relevant results should discuss the compensation process, eligibility criteria, and typical award amounts for injuries comparable to those shown in the film.

title: Bordeaux Accessible Events
description: What upcoming events at the Arkéa Arena in Bordeaux offer accessibility accommodations for people with reduced mobility or disabilities?
narrative: The user seeks a list of future Arkéa Arena events that include information on accessibility features, such as wheelchair access, services for disabled attendees, and contact details for reservations. title: Women Farmers Letters
description: What letters were sent by women farmers to Menie Grégoire between 1969 and 1976, and how can they be accessed in the Indre‑et‑Loire archives?
narrative: The user is looking for primary source material—specifically the correspondence from female farm workers to radio host Menie Grégoire during the programme "rural women" (1969‑April 1976). Relevant results must describe the Menie Grégoire fonds (collection 66 J) in the Departmental Archives of Indre‑et‑Loire, identify individual letters or groups of letters from women farmers, provide dates, content summaries, and information on how to view or request the documents (e.g., archive reference numbers, digitisation status, reading‑room procedures).

title: Ombudsman dispute process
description: What are the exact steps, eligibility criteria, and required documents for filing a complaint with the French National Energy Ombudsman?
narrative: The user seeks a complete guide on how to use the National Energy Ombudsman in France to resolve a dispute with an energy supplier. Relevant documents must explain who can use the service (individuals, artisans, SMEs, associations), when to contact the Ombudsman (after contacting the supplier and waiting the prescribed periods), the time‑limits for filing a complaint, how to submit the claim (online or by post), what information and supporting documents are needed, how the mediator processes the case and issues a recommendation, and the options for appeal. Only resources that detail these procedural elements and clarify the Ombudsman's scope (e.g., invoice issues, connection delays, consumption estimates) are considered relevant.

title: Office PC Discount
description: Which office desktop computer is currently on sale with free shipping and the 40 € Microsoft 365 Family promotion?
narrative: The user wants to locate an office‑oriented desktop (central unit) from the retailer’s catalog that is in stock, offers free shipping or free in‑store pickup, includes the 40 € immediate discount when purchased together with Microsoft 365 Family, and satisfies typical office requirements such as at least 8 GB RAM, SSD storage, and a recent operating system (Windows 10 or macOS). Relevant documents are the product listings and promotional notices that mention these features and offers.

title: Silver Photography History
description: What are the key historical processes, materials, and equipment associated with silver‑based photography from its origins to the present?
narrative: The user seeks a comprehensive overview of silver photography, including early optical principles, the daguerreotype, calotype, collodion, gelatin‑silver processes, and later developments such as color silver emulsions and modern digital tools that emulate silver‑grade aesthetics. Relevant documents should describe the chemical reactions, printing papers, lenses, cameras, and laboratory techniques used at each stage, as well as contemporary software (e.g., DxO FilmPack) that reproduces the look of silver films. Only sources that detail these processes, their chronology, and the associated hardware or software are considered relevant.

title: Leek Quiche Variations
description: What quick leek quiche recipes (under 60 minutes) are available, covering both vegetarian and lardon-inclusive versions, with simple ingredients and clear preparation steps?
narrative: The user is looking for concise, easy-to-follow leek quiche recipes that can be prepared and baked within an hour. Relevant results should include recipes that use basic pantry items (leeks, eggs, cream, milk, cheese) and provide detailed cooking times, ingredient proportions, and optional variations such as adding lardons, different cheeses (Gruyère, Roquefort, Munster, etc.), or additional vegetables. Both vegetarian options and those with meat (lardons, smoked salmon, etc.) are of interest, and the user values user feedback or tips that improve flavor or texture.

title: Kid Car Games
description: What free online car games are suitable for children, require no download or Flash, and are safe to play in a web browser?
narrative: The user is looking for browser‑based car games that are appropriate for a young audience. Relevant documents should describe games that run without installing software or using obsolete Flash, have child‑friendly content and controls, and ideally include features such as multiplayer or simple point systems. Pages that list and evaluate such games, mention safety, age‑appropriateness, and indicate that the games are freely playable online will be considered relevant, while listings of adult‑oriented or download‑only car games will not.

title: Mobility Aid Eligibility
description: What are the eligibility requirements and application steps for receiving mobility assistance (travel, accommodation, meals, vouchers) as a job seeker in France?
narrative: The user is looking for detailed information on who qualifies for Pôle emploi's mobility assistance, including income thresholds, employment contract types, distance criteria, and exclusions, as well as the procedures for applying (timing, documents, advisor contact). Relevant documents must explain the conditions for receiving travel reimbursement, SNCF vouchers, reservation vouchers, and SAM host‑family accommodation, the monetary limits, and any special rules for overseas departments or international mobility programs.

title: SFR client login
description: How can I access my SFR client space, reset my password if needed, and view my invoices or LICO account details?
narrative: The user is looking for detailed, step‑by‑step instructions for signing into the SFR client area (including locating the login page, entering the correct credentials, and recovering a forgotten password or username). Relevant documents should describe the login process, password‑reset procedure, and how to navigate the client portal to view invoices, consumption details, and manage LICO lines. Official SFR help pages, community guides, and tutorial videos that cover these tasks are considered relevant, while unrelated marketing or product pages are not.

title: Oil Lamp Replacement
description: What are the recommended criteria and top products for selecting compatible glass, spout, and wick replacements for a vintage oil lamp?
narrative: The user wants detailed guidance on choosing high‑quality replacement parts for an older oil lamp, including how to match glass shape and thickness, select a suitable spout, and pick a wick material (cotton vs. fiberglass) that ensures safe, efficient burning. Relevant answers should mention reputable brands (e.g., Gaudart, Favorit, Cao Camping), material considerations (glass durability, metal types), compatibility with common lamp models, and practical installation tips such as wick trimming and fuel recommendations. Documents describing product selections, brand listings, and how‑to tutorials are considered relevant.

title: Madeira Car Rental
description: What are the most affordable and reliable car rental options in Madeira for a one‑week stay during the high season?
narrative: The user is planning a week‑long vacation in Madeira during the summer and wants to rent a car. Relevant documents must describe rental agencies that operate at Funchal Airport or in the city, provide average daily or weekly prices, indicate whether insurance (deductible coverage) is included, and mention vehicle categories suitable for the island’s steep roads (e.g., compact or intermediate cars with adequate engine power). Information about reservation requirements (credit card, driver age, optional extras) and tips for minimizing total cost (off‑peak months, promotions, fuel policy) is also relevant. Documents that only discuss general tourism information without any rental pricing, agency comparisons, or practical rental advice are not relevant.

title: Early Potato Cooking
description: What are the best practices for storing, handling, and preparing early (new) potatoes, including safety issues with sprouted potatoes and suitable cooking methods or recipes?
narrative: The user is looking for comprehensive guidance on early or "new" potatoes. Relevant information should cover how to store these fragile tubers to prevent sprouting, how to assess and safely remove sprouts or green parts, the nutritional/toxicological aspects of sprouted potatoes (solanine risk), and preferred cooking techniques (e.g., sautéing/rissolée, roasting, boiling with or without skin). The user also wants concrete recipe examples that respect the delicate nature of new potatoes. Documents that discuss the characteristics of new potatoes, storage temperature and humidity, handling tips, health warnings about sprouted potatoes, and step‑by‑step recipes for sautéed, baked, or rissolée preparations are considered relevant.

title: Freelance APRE Eligibility
description: Can a self‑employed RSA beneficiary apply for the personalised back‑to‑work assistance (APRE) to cover startup costs?
narrative: The user is looking for detailed information on whether the APRE programme, which is managed by French departmental councils and typically supports RSA recipients returning to salaried employment, also covers self‑employed or freelance individuals starting a business. Relevant documents should explain the eligibility criteria (RSA status, income thresholds, activity type), any departmental variations, the types of expenses that can be reimbursed (e.g., equipment, vehicle, training), the maximum annual aid amount, and the application procedure (required forms, proofs, deadline). Documents that mention APRE’s scope, its applicability to business creation, and examples of similar requests are considered relevant.
